summary: US-846 release-readiness gate passed. Required Spexus context and task scope were read in order. Exact dependency reports for MZ-601, MZ-602, and MZ-603 are present, valid, accepted for their scopes, and recorded with risks=[] and failure_type=not_applicable. Current source/test inspection confirms PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, and PERSONAL-AC-2431 now have executable evidence. The deterministic full-bullet smoke uses fixed seed 639, real createNewGame/applyAction/getLegalActions engine paths, real chooseAiAction heuristic AI, legality checks before applyAction, phase=finished completion with bulletTarget=1, maxSteps=80, stuck/progress assertions, and useful diagnostics. MZ-603 provides current same-day npm run verify evidence for 14 files / 137 tests plus tsc and vite build, and targeted full-bullet smoke regression evidence for 2 files / 5 tests. Prior US-842 through US-845 completion gates exist and are accepted; this US-846 release gate does not replace product acceptance of those earlier gates. The requested US-841 completion report path remains absent, but current persistence/start-resume executable tests and orchestrator-log completion context are sufficient for this US-846 release gate.

tests_run.evidence: Read active PERSONAL project/default component scope before Spexus task reads.

Confirmed MZ-604 is the US-846 release-readiness verification gate for PERSONAL-EP-180 and must verify MZ-601, MZ-602, MZ-603, full-bullet smoke, regression evidence, NFR classification, and prior US gates.

Reviewed exact dependency reports task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1168/attempt-2.json, task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1169/attempt-1.json, and task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1170/attempt-1.json. All are present and accepted with no risks.

Confirmed current_task=PERSONAL-TASK-1171, completed_tasks includes PERSONAL-TASK-1168, PERSONAL-TASK-1169, and PERSONAL-TASK-1170, report paths match exact requested dependency paths, US-841 through US-845 are listed as completed user stories, and routed AC-2431 risk is closed by MZ-602.

tests_run.command: jq '{status, summary, risks, failure_type, quality_gate_matrix, evidence_matrix}' task-reports/PERSONAL-US-842/review-cycle-1/review-report.json task-reports/PERSONAL-US-843/review-cycle-1/review-report.json task-reports/PERSONAL-US-844/review-cycle-2/review-report.json task-reports/PERSONAL-US-845/review-cycle-2/review-report.json
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed accepted completion-gate evidence exists for US-842, US-843, US-844, and US-845. These gates remain prior product-acceptance evidence and are not replaced by MZ-604.

Confirmed the matrix maps deck/deal, bidding, fixed agreement profile, legal action generation, trick winner, whist/half-whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, save/load, AI legality, and full-bullet smoke to executable tests or downstream owners. Its pre-MZ-602 full-bullet gap is now closed by MZ-602/MZ-603 evidence.

Confirmed fixed seed 639, bulletTarget=1, maxSteps=80, real createNewGame/applyAction/getLegalActions engine calls, real chooseAiAction via chooseDeterministicHarnessAction, legal action assertion before applyAction, finished/noLegalActions/maxSteps stop reasons, trace capture, and diagnostics containing seed, step, phase, actor, legalCount, legal actions, chosen action, trace, and cause.

Confirmed the smoke starts createNewGame(deterministicSeeds.fullBulletSmoke, fixtureDeals.fullBulletSmoke.bulletTarget), runs with fixtureDeals.fullBulletSmoke.maxSteps, asserts stoppedReason=finished, finalSummary.phase=finished, completedSteps within bound, non-empty trace, and step-to-step progress.

Confirmed representative AI decisions are chosen from getLegalActions and applied through applyAction, and the illegal-choice diagnostic test asserts seed, phase, actor, legal actions, legalCount, chosen action, and trace output.
Confirmed npm run verify executes npm run test and npm run build, and npm run build executes tsc and vite build.

Confirmed the requested US-841 completion report path is absent, but current persistence/start-resume executable tests cover active bullet storage, supported bullet sizes, legacy migration, invalid save rejection, finished/non-resumable saves, deal-settlement/next-deal round-trips, start, continue, replacement, and incompatible-save fallback. Orchestrator log lists PERSONAL-US-841 as completed.

tests_run.command: task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1170/attempt-1.json recorded npm run verify and targeted smoke rerun
tests_run.evidence: Relied on exact same-day MZ-603 evidence because source/report consistency checks found no contradiction: npm run verify passed 14 files / 137 tests plus tsc and vite build, and npm test -- src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts passed 2 files / 5 tests.

verification_environment.test_runner: vitest v2.1.9 as recorded by MZ-603
verification_environment.rerun_omission_reason: MZ-603 reran npm run verify and the targeted full-bullet smoke regression immediately before MZ-604 on 2026-07-06. Exact source/report evidence was consistent, so the release gate relied on that current evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Accepted QA coverage matrix is present and usable as release-gate input.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Matrix was authored before MZ-602; MZ-604 reconciled its downstream-routed AC-2431 gap against post-MZ-602/MZ-603 executable evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Missing deterministic full-bullet smoke coverage was implemented.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Smoke intentionally uses bulletTarget=1 and seed=639 for a deterministic, bounded release-evidence gate.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Regression verification completed after MZ-602 and is current enough for MZ-604.
evidence_matrix.limitations: MZ-604 did not rerun npm run verify because exact same-day MZ-603 evidence was complete and consistent.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Automated suite covers rule-critical deck/deal, bidding, fixed agreement profile, legal actions, trick winner, whist/half-whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, save/load, AI legality, and full-bullet smoke.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No exception required; all matrix categories now have current executable evidence.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Rule-critical unit and integration tests execute for deck/deal, bidding, legal actions, trick winner, whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, persistence, and AI legality.
evidence_matrix.limitations: No exception required; full suite and build passed in MZ-603.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deterministic seed plus simple AI full-bullet smoke completes without unhandled error, illegal AI action, or stuck actor.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Smoke uses deterministic seed 639, bulletTarget=1, and maxSteps=80 by design to keep the release evidence fast and bounded.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Requested US-841 completion report path remains missing, but current direct executable persistence/start-resume evidence is sufficient for US-846 release readiness.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Historical traceability report remains absent. The release gate accepts current executable persistence/start-resume tests plus orchestrator completion context as sufficient, with no release risk recorded.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Prior gates exist for US-842 through US-845 and are accepted, and MZ-604 does not replace their product acceptance.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Earlier US gates remain their own acceptance artifacts; this release gate only confirms US-846 readiness.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Used exact requested paths; no report attempts were inferred.
The matrix's pre-MZ-602 full-bullet gap is intentionally downstream-routed and now closed by later evidence.
Single deterministic smoke seed is accepted for the required release-evidence smoke.
MZ-604 relies on same-day complete regression evidence instead of rerunning.
No justified exception or report-only category remains for PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, or PERSONAL-AC-2431.
Smoke uses bulletTarget=1 to make completion deterministic and bounded.
No rerun by MZ-604; MZ-603 evidence is current, complete, and source-consistent.
Regression scope is the static local publishable MVP game loop and associated unit/integration/build suite.
No feature flag, server rollback, or live deployment smoke path applies to this local static app scope.
Static Vite/localStorage app scope with no backend, auth, account, network API, server persistence, database, migration, tenant/scope, or sensitive server boundary introduced by US-846.

quality_gate_matrix.gate: Prior US product acceptance not replaced
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: US-846 release readiness depends on but does not supersede earlier accepted US gates.
The historical completion report path is still absent; current direct executable tests and orchestrator-log completion context are sufficient for the US-846 release gate.
